Name: Project governance baseline
Description: Create the initial governance documents and maintainer policy skeleton for the public project.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single governance surface; policy language only.

Name: Copyright and protected-data boundary policy
Description: Define what data/code/text may not enter the public repository and how suspected protected content is quarantined.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Requires careful wording and legal-review flags.

Name: Contributor certification workflow
Description: Define contributor attestations, provenance fields, review routing, and rejection rules for public data contributions.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Bounded policy artifact.

Name: Professional responsibility and product-claims policy
Description: Define permitted/prohibited claims, report disclaimers, and human approval boundaries.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Policy wording; no code.

Name: Canonical domain model schema
Description: Define project, model, node, element, material, component, load, result, and report entities.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Core schema touches many entity definitions but one domain.

Name: Unit system and dimensional-analysis core contract
Description: Specify unit dimensions, conversion rules, storage conventions, and unit test obligations.
AnticipatedArtifacts: core/units module contract; unit tests; docs/SPEC.md section
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Foundation for solver and rule engine.

Name: Code-neutral analysis boundary model
Description: Define states and interfaces separating mechanics solve, user-rule check, and human professional approval.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Important semantic boundary; limited implementation surface.

Name: Plugin and extension domain contracts
Description: Define extension points and governance constraints for plugins/adapters.
AnticipatedArtifacts: plugin interface spec; sandbox/permission model notes
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Cross-cutting but kept to domain/API definitions.

Name: Project persistence and round-trip serialization
Description: Implement create/open/save/versioned project persistence and deterministic model round-trip behavior for units, loads, rule-pack refs, and provenance metadata.
AnticipatedArtifacts: project file schema; round-trip tests; persistence service contract
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single data persistence surface; file/storage format TBD.

Name: Material library schema with provenance
Description: Define temperature-dependent material property records, source notes, redistribution status, and completeness flags.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Schema plus tests; no proprietary data.

Name: Pipe section and component library schema
Description: Define section/component records for user-entered dimensions, weights, COGs, and source/license metadata.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Library schema only; no protected tables.

Name: Bend and elbow component model fields
Description: Implement model fields for bend geometry, user-entered SIFs, flexibility factors, and source metadata.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single component family.

Name: Branch connection component model fields
Description: Implement branch connection data fields for geometry, reinforcement, user SIF/flexibility, and source metadata.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Component model has more local fields but remains bounded.

Name: Rigid component models for valves, flanges, reducers, and specialty items
Description: Implement rigid/semi-rigid component data structures using user dimensions, weights, COG, and stiffness behavior.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Multiple related rigid components; no data tables.

Name: Expansion joint component model
Description: Implement manufacturer-data-driven expansion joint fields: stiffnesses, effective area, limits, hardware flags.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Specialized but bounded component type.

Name: Public/private library import provenance checker
Description: Implement import validation that records source/license/provenance and flags missing redistribution rights.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Connects schema with governance; no external import formats yet.

Name: Pipe section property and mass-property calculator
Description: Implement unit-aware section and mass-property calculations from user-entered pipe OD, wall, density, contents, insulation, and corrosion basis where applicable.
AnticipatedArtifacts: section property calculator; mass property tests; schema hooks
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Bounded calculation module using user-entered dimensions only.

Name: 3D frame stiffness kernel
Description: Implement the global 3D frame stiffness assembly, coordinate transforms, boundary conditions, and sparse solve interface.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Central solver kernel; large but single domain and foundational.

Name: Straight pipe element
Description: Implement straight pipe local stiffness, section-property integration, weight hooks, and element force recovery.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single element type.

Name: Linear support and restraint models
Description: Implement anchors, guides, line stops, vertical supports, springs, and imposed displacement boundary data.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Support families are related and can share validation.

Name: Nonlinear support active-set solver
Description: Implement iterative activation for one-way supports, gaps, lift-off, and friction with convergence reporting.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Complex; remains one numerical domain.

Name: Sparse solver performance harness
Description: Create deterministic performance/regression harness for practical model sizes and solver numerical conditioning.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Performance harness separate from solver logic.

Name: Solver diagnostics and singularity detection
Description: Implement deterministic diagnostics for singular systems, ill-conditioning, nonconvergence, invalid restraints, and solver status reporting.
AnticipatedArtifacts: solver diagnostics module; singular-model tests; conditioning warnings
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Focused diagnostic layer separate from the stiffness kernel.

Name: Primitive load case engine
Description: Implement load definitions for weight, pressure, thermal, displacement, hydrotest, wind, seismic, and occasional categories.
AnticipatedArtifacts: load case model; load application tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Primitive categories; code combinations remain external.

Name: Load-case algebra engine
Description: Implement unit-aware algebra for user-defined combinations and result-state subtraction/ranging.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Bounded algebra surface.

Name: Fundamental stress recovery module
Description: Implement mechanics stress recovery from axial force, bending, torsion, pressure, and section properties.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Does not encode code stress equations.

Name: Analysis status semantics
Description: Implement explicit statuses for mechanics solved, rule-pack checked, incomplete data, and human-approved/not human-approved.
AnticipatedArtifacts: analysis status enum; API/result fields; tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Small state model with high governance value.

Name: Concentrated and distributed user load application
Description: Implement concentrated forces, concentrated moments, and distributed user loads with unit-aware application and result recovery hooks.
AnticipatedArtifacts: load application module; load tests; result hooks
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Keeps general user loads separate from code-specific combinations.

Name: Rule-pack schema
Description: Define the rule-pack artifact schema: metadata, required inputs, formulas, allowables, statuses, and redistribution flags.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Schema and examples only.

Name: Sandboxed unit-aware expression evaluator
Description: Implement safe formula evaluation with unit checking, variable binding, and deterministic error reporting.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Security-sensitive and numerically important.

Name: Required-input completeness checker
Description: Implement rule-pack completeness checks that block code-check status when required user-supplied inputs are missing.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Connects user data to rule-pack gating.

Name: Private rule-pack lifecycle and checksum handling
Description: Implement versioning, local-private storage markers, checksums, and audit manifest hooks for rule packs.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Local lifecycle only; access control details defer to PKG-12.

Name: Invented non-code example rule pack
Description: Create a demonstration rule pack using invented values and explicit non-engineering notices.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Example only; no proprietary content.

Name: 3D viewport and centerline editor
Description: Implement initial viewport interactions for nodes, pipe runs, bends, and simple component symbols.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: GUI surface is broad but bounded to viewport/editor.

Name: Model tree and property inspector
Description: Implement tree navigation and property panels for selected model entities.
AnticipatedArtifacts: model tree; property inspector; UI tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single UI work surface.

Name: Material, component, and rule-pack editors
Description: Implement editors for private materials, components, and rule-pack references.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Multiple editors but same GUI domain; may split later.

Name: Missing-data warning and blocking UX
Description: Implement warning classes for solve-required, code-check-required, provenance-missing, and assumption states.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: High-value UX slice.

Name: Results viewer
Description: Implement tabular/graphical review for displacements, rotations, forces, moments, reactions, stresses, and ratios.
AnticipatedArtifacts: results panels; visual overlays; UI tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Results surface is substantial but one domain.

Name: Accessibility and usability baseline
Description: Define and implement baseline keyboard, contrast, readability, and review-workflow usability requirements.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: May refine once GUI framework chosen.

Name: Solve execution UX: progress, cancellation, and diagnostics
Description: Implement GUI handling for background solve execution, progress display, cancellation, diagnostic logs, and solver warning presentation.
AnticipatedArtifacts: solve run panel; progress/cancel controls; diagnostics UI tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Single GUI workflow slice for running and inspecting solves.

Name: Calculation report generator
Description: Implement report generation with model input summary, load cases, results, warnings, and rule-pack references.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Report is broad but single artifact family.

Name: Audit manifest and model hash
Description: Implement canonical input manifest, model hash, solver version stamp, and rule-pack checksum capture.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Canonicalization TBD but bounded.

Name: Warnings, assumptions, and provenance report section
Description: Implement report sections that expose missing data, assumptions, user-supplied values, and source/provenance notes.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Leverages warning data from GUI/core.

Name: Result export format
Description: Define and implement machine-readable result export for tests, review, and downstream tooling.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Format TBD but bounded.

Name: Report protected-content linter
Description: Implement checks that prevent public report templates/examples from embedding protected code text/tables/formulas.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Heuristic plus review; cannot be sole legal control.

Name: Mechanics benchmark suite
Description: Create benchmark cases for cantilevers, frames, thermal growth, imposed displacement, and stiffness transforms.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Uses original/public mechanics cases.

Name: Stress recovery benchmark suite
Description: Create stress recovery benchmark cases for axial, bending, torsion, pressure, and stress range behavior.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: No code formulas.

Name: Nonlinear support regression suite
Description: Create active-set/gap/friction/lift-off convergence and regression cases.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Depends on nonlinear solver maturity.

Name: Validation manual skeleton
Description: Draft validation manual structure distinguishing verification, validation, user rule checks, and professional reliance.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Documentation-oriented.

Name: Release quality gate checklist
Description: Define release gates for solver changes, rule-engine changes, GUI releases, and report-template releases.
AnticipatedArtifacts: release QA checklist; CI quality gates
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Process + CI; bounded.

Name: Public API and plugin boundary
Description: Define public API/plugin boundaries for model import/export, solver invocation, results, and rule-pack hooks.
AnticipatedArtifacts: api/openapi.yaml or equivalent; plugin boundary doc
ContextEnvelopeNotes: API details TBD.

Name: Import/export adapter framework
Description: Implement adapter shell with provenance capture and validation hooks for external formats.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Actual external formats can be later deliverables.

Name: Local FEA handoff data contract
Description: Define export package for local shell/solid FEA handoff and criteria labels for when handoff is recommended.
AnticipatedArtifacts: local FEA handoff schema; docs/local-analysis notes
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Guidance only, no external FEA implementation.

Name: Build, packaging, and CI/CD pipeline
Description: Implement reproducible builds, tests, packaging skeleton, and release artifacts for supported platforms.
AnticipatedArtifacts: CI workflows; packaging scripts; release notes template
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Platform list TBD.

Name: Headless CLI and structured I/O analysis runner
Description: Implement a CLI or equivalent headless interface for schema-driven solve execution, benchmark automation, and report/result export before full GUI maturity.
AnticipatedArtifacts: CLI runner; structured input/output fixtures; automation docs
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Automation surface aligned to R0/R1 release milestones.

Name: User guide skeleton
Description: Create user guide structure for project setup, modeling, solving, rule checks, reports, and limitations.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Documentation only.

Name: Developer guide for solver and rule packs
Description: Create developer guide for solver architecture, rule-pack schema, test discipline, and contribution boundaries.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Documentation only.

Name: Theory notes: classical to modern centerline analysis
Description: Draft theory notes explaining the classical flexibility lineage and modern 3D frame implementation without copying protected standards.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Should cite public/permissive sources; no formula copying from standards.

Name: Invented educational example models
Description: Create invented-data example models for mechanics-only and fake-rule-pack demonstrations.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Examples must be clearly non-code.

Name: Contributor tutorial and onboarding
Description: Create onboarding path for new contributors using package/deliverable decomposition and governance docs.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Documentation only.

Name: Local-first storage and private data paths
Description: Define and implement private data storage conventions outside public repository paths.
AnticipatedArtifacts: storage policy; private path conventions; tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Implementation depends on chosen stack.

Name: Private data redaction and export controls
Description: Implement export/report safeguards that warn or redact private rule/material/component values where configured.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Security-sensitive but bounded.

Name: Telemetry off-by-default design
Description: Define and implement telemetry policy with opt-in only behavior and no private engineering data transmission.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: May be no-op in MVP.

Name: Secret and private-library handling
Description: Implement protections for private libraries, paths, and credentials used by imports or private storage.
AnticipatedArtifacts: private library registry; secret handling tests
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Avoids cloud assumptions.

Name: Security threat model
Description: Draft and maintain threat model for private data, report sharing, plugins, imports, and supply chain.
ContextEnvelopeNotes: Document now; update as architecture matures.
